title: Third Person Camera
description: A dynamic 3rd Person Camera mod where u can change the position of the camera using a menu which can be accessed using a keybind, which also can be changed from the control settings
body:
# **📷 3rd Person Camera**
**Completely client-sided!**

**3rd Person Camera mod, Minecraft’s third-person camera with smooth, intelligent behavior and full in-game customization. Designed to feel natural and responsive, it automatically adapts to your surroundings while giving you precise control over camera positioning and zoom.**

**✨ Features**
- Fully adjustable camera offset:
  >     Customize X / Y / Z offsets relative to the player
  >     Includes X-axis rotation for camera tilt 
- Smooth camera distance:
  >     Natural transitions instead of sudden camera jumps
- Adaptive zoom in tight spaces:
  
  >     Camera smoothly moves closer when space is limited
- Automatic first-person switching:
  >     Seamlessly switches when third-person is not viable
- Contextual zoom while aiming:
  
  >     Camera zooms in when using specific items (configurable)
- In-game settings screen:
  
  >     Changes apply instantly with live visual feedback
- Keybind support:
  
  >     Press O to open the settings screen
  >     Fully rebindable under the “Camera Fix” controls category

  
**🎮 Why use Camera Fix?**

  >     Eliminates camera clipping and awkward angles
  >     Ideal for combat, exploration, and cinematic gameplay
  >     Highly customizable without restarting the game
